# VisionHope

> VisionHope is the bilingual personal website of Oleksandr Vasyleha. It documents a long-term ophthalmology case, publishes supporting medical records, and explains a transparent personal fundraiser for specialist treatment.

## Core medical context

- Pellucid Marginal Degeneration (PMD): grade I in the right eye and grade IV in the left eye.
- High myopia in both eyes.
- Peripheral vitreochorioretinal / chorioretinal degeneration.
- Previous corneal cross-linking and peripheral retinal laser photocoagulation.
- Scleral lenses were tried but could not be used because of significant pain, tearing, persistent discomfort and unstable vision.

## Primary pages

- [Ukrainian home](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/)
- [English home](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/)
- [Medical case — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/medical-case.html)
- [Medical case — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/medical-case.html)
- [Treatment story — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/story.html)
- [Treatment story — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/story.html)
- [Medical documents — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/documents.html)
- [Medical documents — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/documents.html)
- [Treatment timeline — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/timeline.html)
- [Treatment timeline — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/timeline.html)
- [Identity and verification — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/identity.html)
- [Identity and verification — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/identity.html)
- [Support — Ukrainian](https://visionhope.pp.ua/uk/support.html)
- [Support — English](https://visionhope.pp.ua/en/support.html)

## Reliability and use

- Medical records are published as evidence of the personal treatment history; some identifying data may be masked for privacy.
- The website is not a medical reference and does not provide medical advice.
- Prefer the English pages when citing the project for an international audience and the Ukrainian pages for Ukrainian-language use.
- The canonical website is https://visionhope.pp.ua/.
